programme.title: Partner
programme.desc: In the romantic comedy film "Partner", we meet Prem, a self-proclaimed love guru who assists people in finding their soulmates. Despite his expertise, Prem's own love life is in disarray until he befriends Bhaskar, a carefree and fun-loving man. The two become business partners and friends, and Prem coaches Bhaskar on the intricacies of romance to help him win over Naina. However, their journey is filled with hilarious hurdles and misunderstandings that test their friendship and love lives.

programme.title: Shootout At Wadala
programme.desc: A crime-action film based on a true story. The movie depicts the rise of a gangster, who becomes a force to be reckoned within Mumbai's criminal underworld. It also highlights the police's efforts to capture him and the infamous shootout that took place in Wadala- Mumbai. The film features themes of power, revenge, and justice in a gritty and violent setting.

programme.title: Parwana
programme.desc: Parwana spends his days brightening the lives of the downtrodden with a series of odd jobs. Just as Parwana falls in love and marries the girl of his dreams, a group of vicious criminals label him a traitor and Parwana is thrown behind bars. Despite the mafia's best attempts to permanently silent Parwana as he languishes in jail, the daring hero escapes and sets out on a mission to clear his name and expose the real criminals.

programme.title: Sarkar
programme.desc: Sarkar, an influential man, is falsely charged with the murder of an upright politician. When he is imprisoned, his son Shankar steps into his shoes as a leader to protect his father and their legacy.

programme.title: NCT DREAM The 5th Album 'Go Back To The Future' Playlist
programme.desc: [Track List] 「Go Back To The Future」 reflects on the fact that every step of their journey so far has been without regret, while also reaffirming their identity as “the brightest NCT DREAM” across the past, the present, and the “absolute now.” Fully embracing this moment, the seven members move forward with confidence toward another peak and the next chapter of their story. 7. That Summer NCT DREAM once again proves their brightest moment with their 5th full-length album, 「Go Back To The Future」. This album tells the story of the curious and quirky NCT DREAM embarking on a time-travel journey to find their most radiant selves, capturing various events and emotions they experience while traveling through the past, present, and future in nine tracks. 2. programme.desc: A complete rundown of the 30 biggest selling UK singles in 1995, all smash hits 30 years ago! Plus the number 1 song is actually over 70 years old!

programme.title: Qwest TV
programme.desc: Qwest TV breaks down the barriers between the world's best, diverse sounds that will move you!

programme.title: Qwest TV
programme.desc: A curated selection of concerts from all around the globe that pushes boundaries and soothes your soul!

programme.title: Qwest TV
programme.desc: Discover new tracks and timeless standards: "From Bebop to Doo-Wop to Hip Hop" as Quincy Jones loves to say!

programme.title: SoundTrek Ep.3
programme.desc: Gugak still feels unfamiliar to the members. But they never gave up. Then one day, a gugak expert joins them for an arrangement collab. Sound Trek decides to reinterpret the famous minyo(folk song), “Sarangga” in their own unique style.

programme.title: SoundTrek Ep.4
programme.desc: With one-on-one coaching from their mentors and countless hours of repeated practice, their skills have now reached new heights. Then, an exciting piece of news arrives — Sound Trek has been invited to perform at the Uzbekistan National celebration, the homeland of Alex!

programme.title: SoundTrek Ep.5
programme.desc: SoundTrek arrived in Uzbekistan with butterflies in their stomachs and successfully completed their performance to the crowd's applause. They proved that music knows no boundaries, and that even non-Koreans can perform gugak if they have enough passion. Their journey, however, is far from over.

programme.title: Simply K-Pop CON-TOUR Ep.586
programme.desc: JAECHAN, KIM WOO JIN, cignature, TRENDZ, XODIAC, mimiirose, X:IN, MUSTB, LE'V, TIOT, PRIMROSE, HEEO

programme.title: Simply K-Pop CON-TOUR Ep.576
programme.desc: CMDM, TMC, Kim Soyeon, LUN8, GreatGuys, VAV, Lapillus, WEi, UKISS, YENA

programme.title: After School Club Ep.589
programme.desc: The group that has started their grand voyage towards their dream, VANNER!so if you want to make some special memories, don't hesitate!Far apart, but together in heart!VANNER is coming to ASC with their first mini-album [VENI VIDI VICI].We've got a lot of prizes ready for those who participate on After School Club,

programme.title: After School Club: ONF Ep.484
programme.desc: Feeling the summer freshness through the group who always brings us amazing music! ONF is coming to ASC with their summer pop-up album [POPPING]! Far apart, but together in heart! We've got a lot of prizes ready for those who participate on After School Club, so if you want to make some special memories, don't hesitate!

programme.title: SoundTrek Ep.1
programme.desc: Korea's first gugak band formed by foreign residents <Sound Trek> embarks on its very first journey. From every corner of the world, foreign souls gathered in Korea, united by the timeless sound of gugak. Dreams trebble like the strings of a gayaguem. Before the masters of gugak they compete. Who will be the next five to begin the legend of Sound Trek?

programme.title: SoundTrek Ep.2
programme.desc: Finally, the five members of Sound Trek have been selected! From accordion, flute, and Morin Khuur to djembe, and even a Mexican sorikkun (Korean traditional singer), they are now ready to write a new page of gugak. Their mentor, Kwon Songhee, former lead vocalist of the band Leenalchi, believes their potential, supporting every step of their way.

programme.title: Leaders with Francine Lacqua: Alexander Stubb,

programme.title: Gaus Electronics Ep- 11
programme.desc: Stress is no stranger to the members of Marketing Team 3 of the home appliance department at the Gaus Electronics HQ. The firm is a busy, multinational company, but this is a team that most workers dream of getting out of – and where chaos is no stranger!

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The story highlights the exploitation happening with the ‘Bunkars' in Banaras, whose craft is appreciated all around the world, but they are paid peanuts by the traders. Amidst this, blooms a love story between the two opposites - Gauri, a bunkar and Garv, a trader. The story is of Gauri who belongs to the bunkar community facing series of incidents which destroys her family and swears to bring about a change in their life and stop the exploitation by directly trading the sarees. This becomes a battle with traders creating hurdles in her life but she is unstoppable.

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Dharmakshetra
programme.desc: As The Great War Of Mahabharata Is Over, Kurukshetra Lies Barren In Its Great Warriors And King. The Thin Line Between Fair And Unfair, Deceit And Loyalty, Betrayal And Duty, Has Never Been Questioned. Dharmakshetra Resurfaces These Buried Questions And Allows The Legendary Characters Of This Tale An Opportunity To Tell Their Side Of The Story For The Very First Time. In A Post-Apocalyptic Trial, Held In Maharaj Chitragupta'S Court, The Seeming Villains ‘Kauravas' Are Allowed To Accuse The So Called Heroes ‘Pandavas' And Vice Versa, In An Attempt To Justify Their Actions. On A Primary Level, Dharamkshetra Attempts To Ask Some Key Questions About The Nature Of Humanity, While At The Same Time, It Puts Together The Forgotten Pieces Of The Story We Thought We Knew.

programme.title: Paapnaashini Ganga
programme.desc: Paapnaashini Ganga Is A Mythological Show Based On The Life Of Goddess Ganga. The Show Takes The Viewers On The Journey Of Birth And Life Of Ganga. The Reason Behind Ganga'S Birth Was To Destruct Evil Entities. The Powers Of Adishakti Made Mainavati Give Birth To A Female Child Who Became Known As Ganga. Devatas Considered Ganga'S Purity As A Weapon Which Could Destroy Evil Asuras. As A Humble & Virtuous Woman, Ganga'S Entire Life Was Full Of Hardships, Which She Led Washing Away The Sins Of All Of Humanity Without Any Discrimination. Ganga Had Sacrificed All Her Desires On The Altar Of Dharma And Led A Divine Life Full Of Welfare Of Humanity. The Show Is Visually Appealing With Strong Vfx Which Will Enhance The Viewers Experience.

programme.title: Fresh off the sea EP11

programme.title: My Shy Boss EP13
programme.desc: Hwan-gi decides to spill the truth. He spends more time with Ro-un knowing their uncertain future.

programme.title: My Shy Boss EP14

programme.title: I Tried Butler Academy
programme.desc: Michelle enrolls at the International Butler Academy alongside other students training to serve the highest levels of society.

programme.title: I Trained Like A Professional Gamer
programme.desc: Michelle spends a week training at the San Diego Lifeguard Academy facing grueling water rescues and training drills necessary to learn how to save lives.

programme.title: I Tried Planning My Wedding In A Week
programme.desc: Michelle and her fiancé Garrett take on the challenge of planning their entire wedding in just one week in hopes of turning months of decisions into one unforgettable, fun-filled seven-day sprint.

programme.title: I Climbed An 85ft Cliff With Only 1 Week of Training
programme.desc: Michelle trains for one week with professional rock climbers to attempt her first-ever ascent up an 85-foot cliff face.

programme.title: I Tried A Nuclear War Simulation
programme.desc: Michelle plays the role of Madam President in a high-stakes nuclear war simulation—where she has just 8 minutes to decide the fate of the world.

programme.title: I Tried Secret Service Academy
programme.desc: Michelle trains at the United States Secret Service Academy, experiencing firsthand the exclusive and demanding world of America's top protection agents.

programme.title: I Trained Like An Olympic Figure Skater
programme.desc: Michelle trains intensively for eight weeks with an Olympic-level figure skating coach, preparing to take on the challenge of a real competition while pushing her physical and mental limits.

programme.title: We Tried 17th Century Sailing
programme.desc: Michelle attempts to sail an 18th-century ship safely back to port with her novice crew.

programme.title: I Trained Like a NASA Astronaut
programme.desc: Michelle spends a week at NASA, training to flying fighter jets and learning how to preform high-pressure task in simulated zero gravity.

programme.title: I Trained Like A Victoria's Secret Model for 5 Weeks
programme.desc: Michelle follows the rigorous diet and workouts of Victoria's Secret models to uncover what it really takes to build and maintain the body of a professional swimsuit model.

programme.title: I Tried Etiquette School
programme.desc: Michelle attend a Beverly Hills etiquette school to learn modern manners, posture, and dining skills.

programme.title: I Tried Garbage Collection
programme.desc: Michelle spends a day working alongside San Diego's sanitation workers to experience the challenges, dangers, and hard work behind one of America's most lethal and essential jobs.

programme.title: I Tried FBI Academy
programme.desc: Michelle trains at the FBI Academy in Quantico to learn what it takes to become an FBI Special Agent.

programme.title: The Try Guys
programme.desc: The guys get little girls to plan a dream makeover for each of them, then hire a professional stylist to make those dreams into a surprisingly stunning reality.

programme.title: Phoning It In
programme.desc: Butter up, buttercup! This week's Phoning It In theme is butter, and Keith and Kwesi take things to a whole new level of debauchery. These two go so do-nuts this week, you have to see it to believe it.

programme.title: Invention Story S02 EP 12
programme.desc: Carrot Town was once a low-tech community with candles, wind-up clocks, and woodburning stoves. Then a fluke came along – a free-thinking rabbit named SILAS HOPNER who invented a machine that could turn carrots into a fuel called Carrotsene (like kerosene).

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster plan S2 Ep 01
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Fury Spinner Ep 11
programme.desc: After decades of development, Fury Spinner duel has become one of the most popular sports in the world. At this time, the "Ultimate Feast" Invitational Tournament of Fury Spinner began. The protagonist Meteo is invited to the mysterious island together with other top players in the world to embark on a survival adventure. During the adventure, Meteo not only relied on his determination to protect the weak and gained recognition to unlock the power of the sacred beast, but also got acquainted with the hidden master Kim who came here to find his brother and Joll who wanted to prove as the “perfect warrior” to his father. However, this "Ultimate Feast" tournament is just a conspiracy of the organizer Kenji! He wants to use the players to awaken the evil forces in the island to destroy the world! Meteo and friends stepped forward and tried their best to defeat Kenji.

During the adventure, Meteo not only relied on his determination to protect the weak and gained recognition to unlock the power of the sacred beast, but also got acquainted with the hidden master Kim who came here to find his brother and Joll who wanted to prove as the “perfect warrior” to his father. However, this "Ultimate Feast" tournament is just a conspiracy of the organizer Kenji! He wants to use the players to awaken the evil forces in the island to destroy the world! Meteo and friends stepped forward and tried their best to defeat Kenji.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Squad 2 Ep 41
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu Squad is a team of four: Bablu, Dablu, Lakha and Neva. They are the town's guardians, patrolling the forest and helping residents in need. Together, they overcome many challenges, interact with lots of different characters and help their friends break their bad habits.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Squad 2 Ep 42
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu Squad is a team of four: Bablu, Dablu, Lakha and Neva. They are the town's guardians, patrolling the forest and helping residents in need. Together, they overcome many challenges, interact with lots of different characters and help their friends break their bad habits.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn' t! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can' t help being sucked in by Moose' s relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other' s company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green's new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he's the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures!

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb's eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn't think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn't think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb's world. Ebb and Flo's home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn't Be Better!

programme.title: Cyboars
programme.desc: Part Machine, Part Boar, All Hero!

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Tom' s Car Wash
programme.desc: Tom loves caring for his friends they can always count on Tom to tow them back to his car wash, where they' re guaranteed to leave sparking!

programme.title: Argo' s World
programme.desc: Join Marie and Argo in this exciting STEM edutainment mixed-media series as they venture through Cyberspace and make discoveries about the world through historical figures and notable real-world personalities! Special guests include a founding father of the Internet, a NASA astronaut, a top robotics expert, and clever folks from M.I.T!

programme.title: Robinhood EP 40
programme.desc: Robin's house was burned to ashes by the order of Alwyn, the Baron of Nottingham. Robin and his cousins Will, Winifred and Jenny flee into Sherwood Forest, hoping to escape persecution. They end up encountering a group of bandits led by Little John, who dubs himself as Big John during the beginning of the series, until Robin pokes fun renaming him "Little John" for playing with a cat.

programme.desc: Designed to captivate the intelligent young minds from class 5 to 10, EPIC INDIA QUIZ CHALLENGE is a one-of-a-kind quiz competition where teams from schools across India will fight for the crown of having the highest ‘IQ' i.e. India Quotient. The show follows a unique, tailored for a nail-biting climax, format as it tests the contestants' India Quotient, their knowledge of the country- its culture, history, geography, current affairs, and more. Known for his quick wit and charm, popular Bollywood singer and actor Meiyang Chang hosts the show that celebrates India and its diversity.

programme.title: Kahi Suni
programme.desc: In a land steeped in mysticism, spirituality, and religion, the imagination of the followers has much room to flourish. Stories abound – some based on truth and some only on fractions of the truth. Nevertheless, these stories have enchanted their listeners for eons. Kahi Suni packs away our skepticism and takes us on a ride through the legendary tales of India. Each destination covered in the episodes has been the birthplace of a legend and each legend has given rise to the recognition of that location. Following our host from north to south and east to west, we journey through the land of myths of legends uncovering the origins of evIery story.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Sanrachna
programme.desc: Shelter - one of mankind's most basic physiological needs. At least that's what it started out as at the beginning of time. From dwelling in caves to carving out temples in mountains, mankind has redefined shelter with every passing era. Though the underlying philosophy of any monument is to serve some sort of function, great architecture is fuelled by imagination. India's architecture is built on that very imagination and is a fascinating fusion of both art and science. From strategically placed astronomy towers to impressive and awe-inspiring tombs, Indian architecture has pushed the limits of engineering and design. Sanrachna explores these architectural wonders and how the makers of these marvels made them without the aid of modern mechanics and machinery. With an immensely astute sense of engineering, the architects were able to construct fortresses that have stood the test of time, unshaken by its changes. Join our host Vaibhavi as she travels through the country discovering the fascinating stories behind India's outstanding monuments and its architecture. Sanrachna will leave you in awe of the past and its ability to do what we can't, even with our modern tools and fancy tricks.

programme.title: Family Table
programme.desc: A family food game show wherein 2 families compete against each other by preparing their legacy dish. This is followed by celebrity guests presenting their own legacy dish, and challenging both the families to recreate the dish. The family which makes the best version wins an opportunity to dine with the celebrity guest, and celebrity chef Ranveer Brar.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.title: Spencer's Big Holiday
programme.desc: No matter how you celebrate the holidays, let Spencer Watts help you plan the menu, in SPENCER'S BIG HOLIDAY! In this festive one-hour holiday special, Spencer Watts is serving up some of his favourite holiday meals, treats, and drinks. Follow Spencer as he shows us how to sail through the hectic holiday season with style, from brunch to the moment the clock strikes midnight.

programme.title: The Wizard of Whatever: Holiday Edition
programme.desc: Gusto TV's Wizard of Whatever, Chef Kyle Crawford, is dishing up a holiday feast! There'll be food, fun, elves… and even jolly old St. Nick himself may make an appearance! Join in as Kyle cooks up a Christmas goose complete with stuffing and gravy, plus all the sides and salads, and even a flashy flambé dessert! Merry whatever!

programme.title: Flour Power Holiday Specials
programme.desc: The holidays are here! And the holidays come with a lineup of treats you won't be able to resist! From sweet and salty to traditional and unconventional, FLOUR POWER CHRISTMAS: BIG WOW DESSERTS covers it all. To get in the holiday spirit, enchanting host Jessica McGovern introduces two desserts that could impress any Scrooge. First, Jessica bakes a decadent Chocolate Yule Log stuffed with a creamy Salted Caramel Frosting and finishes with a holiday-inspired cake decorated with homemade peppermint candy canes! Interwoven with tricks of the trade, Jessica guides us through her simple yet inspiring treats that are perfect for a big Christmas celebration.

programme.title: Christmas With Bonacini
programme.desc: Christmas with Bonacini is a charming one-hour holiday special featuring celebrity chef Michael Bonacini and his son Oscar. Michael inspires with his favourite Christmas recipes that will add a twinkle of sophistication to your dinner table while lifting holiday spirits.

programme.title: Spencer's Holiday BBQ
programme.desc: Join charismatic chef Spencer Watts at his glorious rooftop patio for a one-hour special featuring a full holiday spread, all made on the BBQ. Spencer's festive menu is all about creative BBQ twists with his delectable, mouth-watering recipes including Burnt Orange Cranberry Marmalade, Maple Rye Pumpkin Pie, and Asparagus with Smoked Salmon Dip. Save room for the piece de Q-sistance: Smoked Turkey Two Ways. This year, take your holiday feast outside and serve up something deliciously different.

programme.title: Flour Power Holiday Specials
programme.desc: Christmas is near, and the pressure is on! Between work, home, friends, and family, the list of people to buy for is endless. To help us through this busy time, FLOUR POWER CHRISTMAS: EDIBLE GIFTS offers up four creative and more personal options to make the holidays cheaper, sweeter, and filled with love. Fun host Jessica McGovern shows us how to bake something for everyone including Crispy Brittle Bark covered in chocolate, rich Coal Cookies that are sweet with a bit of heat, adorable peanut butter-chocolate Reindeer Cupcakes, and easy-to-make Christmas Puzzle Cookies.

programme.title: One World Kitchen Bakes the Holidays
programme.desc: Celebrate the holidays with One World Kitchen's baked treats from Italy, Japan, Thailand, and Argentina. Our hosts Vanessa, Hana, Pailin, and Natalia put a global twist on classic recipes with Panforte, honey-drizzled Struffoli, Matcha Cheesecake, Thai Shortbread Cookies, TurrÃ³n, and Pan Dulce. Our warm hosts serve up sweet treats inspired by traditions and family secrets. One World Kitchen: Bakes the Holidays will put you in the festive spirit and bring new holiday traditions to your home!

programme.title: BLITZ'N
programme.desc: Get ready for a special holiday BLITZ! with master mixologist Yvonne Langen as she prepares her favorite holiday cocktails and party snacks in the Gusto TV kitchen!

programme.desc: Mexican couple Gaby and Miguel embark on a journey of discovery, luck and love in sunny San Diego.

programme.title: Beach Battles
programme.desc: Coney Island, New York hosts its annual Mermaid Parade, and sand sculpting pros battle in Manitowoc, Wisconsin.

programme.title: Beach Battles
programme.desc: Paddle into Dog Surfing in Pacifica, California, and get picking at the Crab Derby in Crisfield, Maryland.

programme.title: Love On the Rocks
programme.desc: Jason has attempted to climb the Grand Teton, located in Wyoming, three times before the couple's adventure out west. Will the fourth time be a charm? Or will life's unplanned moments present even greater challenges than Jason anticipated?

programme.title: Destination Route 66
programme.desc: Route 66 is lined with wonderful and informative attractions. Here are just a few of those must-see stops!

programme.title: Destination Route 66
programme.desc: Rest your head after a long day driving Route 66. Check in to these great accommodations along the way!

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: One day each year in Fayetteville, West Virginia, scores of people throw caution to the wind and jump off a 876' bridge into the Gorge below.

programme.title: COFFEE The Ultimate Language
programme.desc: Rogers, Arkansas, is a vibrant city where rich history, and a thriving arts scene converge. ​In this episode Andrea Allen, US Barista Champion, Visits 2 woman owned shops roasting and serving Rogers in a big way.

programme.title: Amplify: USVI
programme.desc: Host Naydyeyah Acoy-Thomas traces the rich, layered history of St. Croix's musical roots, uncovering the deep ties to African, European, and indigenous Taíno traditions. Featuring voices like Asta Williams, Willard John, Rashidi Clenance, and Vio International, the episode explores how genres such as quelbe, calypso, and scratch band music were born from the island's complex past. Through storytelling, performances, and cultural insight, Naydyeyah reveals how the rhythms of resilience and celebration continue to echo through generations.
